banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Sanne de Vries, a Dutch resident registering a brand-new one-person eenmanszaak, 'Amber & Thread', making and selling handmade jewellery in a shop and online in Utrecht, importing beads from abroad. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective visibility/requiredness from the schema's own visibleWhen/requiredWhen/required members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all 47 fields in schema.fields.
